source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT SourceSchemaName
	,SourceTableName
	,SourceQuery + CASE 
		WHEN LastWatermarkValue IS NULL
			AND WatermarkDataType = 'DATETIME'
			THEN '01/01/1900'
		WHEN LastWatermarkValue IS NULL
			AND WatermarkDataType = 'INT'
			THEN '0'
		WHEN LastWatermarkValue IS NULL
			AND WatermarkDataType = 'N/A'
			THEN ''
		ELSE LastWatermarkValue
		END AS SourceQuery,
		SourceName
FROM [IncrementalLoadMetadata];
